name: giai-bong-da-doan-phuong
description: Website quản lý và theo dõi Giải bóng đá Thanh niên Đoàn phường — Production Ready

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.docker:dev: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml -f docker/docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file docker/.env up -d --build
scripts.docker:prod: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml -f docker/docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file docker/.env up -d --build
scripts.docker:migrate: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec backend php artisan migrate
scripts.docker:seed: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec backend php artisan db:seed
scripts.docker:artisan: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec backend php artisan
scripts.test:backend: docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml exec backend php artisan test
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
